name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly restructures the analysis workflow. While the overall goal remains the same, the new plan introduces different statistical methods (Theil-Sen regression, power-law slope fitting, Maiolino MZR comparison), removes the survival bias modeling (alpha-dependent disruption), and consolidates the figures into a single multi-panel plot. Because the computational steps and the specific statistical analyses have changed, it is safer to restart the execution to ensure consistency with the new methodology.
